entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A nutrient-rich staple food adapted to semi-arid tropics, primarily grown in Asia and Africa

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is a crucial staple food

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is a crucial staple food

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climate to which pearl millet is adapted

entities.name: 4K SNP PANEL
entities.description: A newly developed mid-density genotyping panel consisting of 4,000 single nucleotide polymorphisms

entities.name: IN-SILICO PIPELINE
entities.description: A comprehensive computational process used to mine SNPs from whole-genome sequences

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of an organism's genome

entities.name: AGRISEQ TARGETED GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A technology used for cost-effective, fast, and reproducible genotyping of pearl millet inbreds

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species or population

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to measure the informativeness of a genetic marker

entities.name: EXPECTED HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: OBSERVED HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: The actual proportion of individuals that are heterozygous at a given locus

entities.name: B AND R LINES
entities.description: Two major groups of pearl millet accessions differentiated by the SNP panel

entities.name: PCA
entities.description: Principal Component Analysis used to differentiate accessions into major groups

entities.name: STRUCTURE MODELS
entities.description: Models used to differentiate accessions based on their pedigree

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify regions of high and low LD across chromosomes

entities.name: CHR1
entities.description: Chromosome 1 of pearl millet, showing more low LD regions

entities.name: CHR2
entities.description: Chromosome 2 of pearl millet, showing more low LD regions

entities.name: CHR3
entities.description: Chromosome 3 of pearl millet, showing higher LD regions

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between the B- and R-line populations

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The application of molecular markers and genomics to improve crop varieties

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the genomic region associated with a specific trait

entities.name: BACKCROSS BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introduce a specific trait into an elite line

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection that uses genome-wide markers to predict breeding values
